name: Dropdown
description: DropdownItem (generic leading slot, 4 states default/hover/selected/disabled, 2 sizes sm-36/lg-56, optional checkbox/badge/shortcut/toggle/button/rightIcon slots) and DropdownMiscItem (search input, 'Add Workspace' button row, and a caption footer row).
sourceNote: Figma defined 6 rigid leading-visual types (Basic/Country/Avatar/Provider/Brand/Company) baking in specific flag/logo images; simplified to a single generic `leading` ReactNode slot, matching the pattern used for CheckboxCard/CommandMenuItem. Per the fetched state matrix (nodes 379:6626/398:5815/401:3360/401:3474), the 'Selected' state keeps the same white background as 'Default' — selection is communicated only by the checkbox's checked fill, not a row highlight.
